norwegian: Det er ___ gang jeg besøker Tromsø.
english: It is the first time I visit Tromsø.

norwegian: Hun bor i ___ etasje.
english: She lives on the third floor.

norwegian: ___ av melken er igjen i flasken.
english: Half of the milk is left in the bottle.

norwegian: ___ av elevene hadde gjort leksene.
english: Three quarters of the pupils had done the homework.

norwegian: Det andre laget vant kampen.
english: The second team won the match.

norwegian: Han ble født i to tusen og tre.
english: He was born in 2003.

norwegian: Dette er den tiende dagen av ferien.
english: This is the tenth day of the holiday.

norwegian: En tredjedel av befolkningen bor i byene.
english: One third of the population lives in the cities.

norwegian: Tusenvis av turister besøker Norge hvert år.
english: Thousands of tourists visit Norway every year.

norwegian: Jeg er første i køen.
english: I am first in line

norwegian: Han spiser en halv pizza.
english: He eats half a pizza

norwegian: Det er tredje gangen jeg prøver.
english: It's the third time I'm trying

norwegian: Jeg har en tredjedel av en time.
english: I have one third of an hour

norwegian: To tusen og tolv var et godt år.
english: Two thousand and twelve was a good year

norwegian: Hun var syvende i løpet.
english: She was seventh in the race

norwegian: Jeg har tusen norske kroner.
english: I have one thousand Norwegian kroner

norwegian: Det er andre gangen jeg ser filmen.
english: It's the second time I'm watching the movie

norwegian: Jeg har en fjerdedel av en liter melk.
english: I have a quarter of a liter of milk

norwegian: Nittiåra var en spennende tid.
english: The nineties were an exciting time

norwegian: Hun er andre i løpet.
english: She is second in the race.

norwegian: Jeg ble født i nittiåra.
english: I was born in the nineties.

norwegian: Han har hundre euro i lommen.
english: He has a hundred euros in his pocket.

norwegian: Jeg kjøpte en bil for tusen kroner.
english: I bought a car for a thousand kroner.

norwegian: Jeg er femte i klassen.
english: I am fifth in the class.

norwegian: Han er syvende i rekken.
english: He is seventh in line.

norwegian: Det er første gang.
english: It's the first time

norwegian: Jeg har en tredjedel av kaken.
english: I have a third of the cake

norwegian: Det er tusen meter til toppen.
english: It's a thousand meters to the top

norwegian: Han er andre i konkurransen.
english: He is second in the competition

norwegian: Hun spiste en halv pizza.
english: She ate half a pizza

norwegian: Han kom på fjerde plass i konkurransen.
english: He came in fourth place in the competition.

norwegian: Halvparten av pengene er allerede brukt.
english: Half of the money is already spent.

norwegian: Billetten koster to hundre og femti kroner.
english: The ticket costs two hundred and fifty kroner.

norwegian: Hun fyller år den tjuende januar.
english: She has her birthday on the twentieth of January.

norwegian: To tredjedeler av kaken er spist.
english: Two thirds of the cake are eaten.

norwegian: Det er den tolvte gangen han har ringt i dag.
english: It is the twelfth time he has called today.

norwegian: Hotellet har tre hundre og tjue rom.
english: The hotel has three hundred and twenty rooms.

norwegian: Vi bor i ___ etasje.
english: We live on the sixth floor.

norwegian: ___ av studentene besto eksamen.
english: Half of the students passed the exam.

norwegian: Jeg er ___ i køen på legekontoret.
english: I am eighth in line at the doctor's office.
